org.arakhne.neteditor.io.eps

Class EpsGraphics2D.EpsContext

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.eps.EpsGraphics2D.EpsContext
  • Enclosing class:
    EpsGraphics2D

    protected static class EpsGraphics2D.EpsContext
extends Object
    Define a context in the EPS generation.
